name: Fasolakia Prasina Yiahni (Green Beans in Oi
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Tomatoes, peeled and chopped OR
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the green beans and break them in half or slice them lengthwise. Place them in a large pot of cold water.
2. Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Sauté the onions until soft and limp.
3. Add the tomatoes (or diluted tomato paste with water) to the pot and bring to a boil.
4. Drain the green beans and add them to the pot with the onions, tomato mixture, parsley, salt, and pepper. Add enough water to barely cover the beans.
5. Cook over medium heat until the liquid is absorbed but the oil remains, about 30 to 45 minutes.
